No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), develops practical language skills (4.4), and explicitly fosters an 'International Perspective' (F. 國際視野), promoting global citizenship and cultural diversity (4.7).
evidence: 提升修課同學之閱讀與實用德文的能力

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course enhances 'practical German abilities' and 'practical application' (B. 實務運用), which directly improves employment prospects and contributes to decent work (Target 8.5).
evidence: 提升修課同學之閱讀與實用德文的能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Fostering an 'International Perspective' (F. 國際視野) through language learning can indirectly promote social inclusion and understanding across different origins (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Learning German provides access to and appreciation for German culture, a very indirect link to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and use legal textbooks promotes responsible consumption of intellectual property (Target 12.8).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。 Respect Copyright.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and use legal textbooks directly supports the promotion of the rule of law (Target 16.3, 16.b).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。 Respect Copyright.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing 'International Perspective' (F. 國際視野) and 'Expression & Communication' (C. 表達溝通) through language learning builds capacity for international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
